author: doll-agent
content: Drop the silent _axis param from count_masked. Add a new count_masked_axis(ma, axis) function that actually does per-slice masked counts, returning Array<u64, IxDyn> with the reduced axis removed. Update 4 callers (Python binding ma.rs at L208 and L351, property_tests.rs L50, lib.rs L471). Add 3 tests: 2D row counts, 2D column counts, axis out-of-bounds rejection.
